designConstraints: Must use 8px spacing unit grid system with scale values [4, 8, 12, 16, 24, 32, 48, 64]px
Background must use background-primary token (deep-navy #0F172A) consistent with global app dark theme
Form sections and setting groups must use surface-primary (navy-surface #1E293B) cards with elevation level 1 shadow (0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.3))
Input fields must use surface-input (deep-navy #0F172A) background with slate-border (#334155) default border and gold-amber (#F59E0B) focus border
Primary CTA (Save/Done) must use cta-primary gold-amber (#F59E0B) background with text-on-cta deep-navy (#0F172A) text, matching dashboard and add-expense CTA patterns
Typography must use DM Sans (display) for headings and DM Mono (body) for form labels and values
Border radius must follow token scale: small=6px for inputs, medium=10px for cards, large=16px for section containers, pill=9999px for chip-style toggles
Maximum 3 levels of visual hierarchy: page title → section heading → field label
Desktop-first single-column layout with max content width of 1280px and 24px grid margins
All interactive elements must meet minimum touch target size of 44×44px
Navigation back to Dashboard via Save/Done button must be a full-width or prominent primary button at the bottom of the form
Consistent TopBar component usage matching dashboard, add-expense, and spending-insights pages
NavigationTabs shared component must appear at the bottom consistent with other approved pages
Settings sections should be grouped into logical cards (e.g., Profile, Preferences) using the card-based data display pattern established in the dashboard
referencePatterns: Card-based section grouping pattern from Dashboard BudgetSummaryCard and CategoryDonutChart layout
Full-width primary CTA button pattern from Add Expense SaveExpenseButton
Chip selector pattern from Add Expense PaymentMethodChipRow for preference toggles (e.g., currency, locale)
TopBar with back navigation arrow pattern consistent with Add Expense screen
NavigationTabs bottom bar pattern shared across dashboard, add-expense, and spending-insights
Form input field pattern from Add Expense NoteInput with DM Mono body font and slate-border default state
Settings drawer content pattern from existing approved Settings screen for field grouping reference
Section divider pattern using slate-border (#334155) horizontal rules between setting groups
Label + value row pattern from ExpenseRow in RecentExpensesList for read-only profile display fields
Focus ring pattern: 2px gold-amber outline with 2px offset on all interactive inputs and buttons
accessibilityRequirements: WCAG 2.1 AA color contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1 for all body text — silver-text (#CBD5E1) on deep-navy (#0F172A) achieves approximately 10.9:1
WCAG 2.1 AA color contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1 for form labels — silver-text (#CBD5E1) on navy-surface (#1E293B) achieves approximately 8.9:1
WCAG 2.1 AA color contrast ratio of at least 3:1 for large text and UI components — gold-amber (#F59E0B) on deep-navy (#0F172A) achieves approximately 8.5:1
All form inputs must have associated visible <label> elements or aria-label attributes for screen reader compatibility
Save/Done button must have descriptive aria-label indicating action and destination (e.g., 'Save settings and return to Dashboard')
Keyboard navigable form with logical tab order: TopBar → settings sections top-to-bottom → Save/Done CTA → NavigationTabs
Focus ring must be visible on all interactive elements using 2px gold-amber (#F59E0B) outline with 2px offset per design token state.focus_ring
Error states on form fields must use coral-error (#F87171) border and inline error message with role='alert' for screen reader announcement
Success confirmation (post-save) must be announced via aria-live region or toast notification
Section headings must use semantic HTML heading hierarchy (h1 for page title, h2 for section titles) for screen reader navigation
Chip/toggle preference selectors must use role='radio' or role='switch' with aria-checked state as appropriate
Minimum touch target size of 44×44px for all interactive controls per design token touch_targets specification
Page must have a descriptive <title> element and landmark regions (main, nav) for screen reader orientation
Disabled form states must use disabled_opacity of 0.38 and include aria-disabled='true' attribute
dataModelDependencies: UserSettings entity — fields: id, currency, default_monthly_budget, locale, created_at, updated_at (from user-settings model, db_table: user_settings)
GET /api/settings endpoint — fetch current user settings for pre-filling profile and preference fields
PUT /api/settings endpoint — persist updated currency preference, default monthly budget, and locale on Save/Done action
Budget entity — default_monthly_budget field referenced via UserSettings for budget preference display and editing
Category entity — may be referenced for default category preference if profile settings include expense categorization defaults
